core_principles: Density without Clutter - Sales needs information fast.
High Contrast - Black text on white, no gray-on-gray legibility issues.
Energy - Use Orange/Red accents to drive action, not calm Blue.

rules: Never use Inter for H1/H2 headings.
Body text should never be smaller than 13px (0.8125rem) for readability.

theme_setup.instructions: Update src/index.css :root variables with the HSL values provided above. Ensure high contrast. Do not use dark mode by default for this dashboard unless toggled.

structure.sidebar: Fixed width (240px), collapsible, dark or high-contrast border.
structure.main_content: Max-width 1600px, centered if screen is huge, otherwise fluid.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border-gray-200, bg-white. No shadow by default. Hover: border-orange-500/50 transition-colors.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-none rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground shadow-sm rounded-md

inputs.style: h-9 rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-orange-500

tables.style: Compact density. Header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium. Rows: hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors. Border-b only.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px (Thin/Elegant) or 2px (Bold/Clear). Consistent sizing (w-4 h-4 for UI, w-5 h-5 for Nav).

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to extend colors with the provided palette (accent: orange-500).
In 'src/index.css', replace root variables with the HSL values.
Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Header.
Use 'Outlet' from react-router-dom for nested routing.
Implement the Dashboard with the Bento Grid layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (opacity-80 or bg-accent/10).

general: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic gradients, no centered layouts.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index) and subtle borders.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers/overlays.
DO NOT apply 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
DO NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Use modern button styles (pill or sharp rounded-md) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant emojis (🤖, 🧠, etc) as icons. Use Lucide icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-6, p-8).
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can add premium feel.
components: Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components from 'src/components/ui'.
Customize them to match the 'The Performance Pro' identity (sharper, denser).
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text).
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-orange-500).
